facts.claim: Active alert (RULE-ANTIMICROBIANO-001) maps 5 criteria flags (3,4,5,6,8) to VERMELHO/AMARELO/NEUTRO enum; VERMELHO if 4 or 8, AMARELO if 3,5,6, else NEUTRO. On NEUTRO, assistido→False.

Stewardship pathway (RULE-ANTIMICROBIANO-003) defines 12 criteria: duration >7d, short-spectrum + internacao >48h, weight/renal dose adjust, CVC >7d + fever, empiric echinocandin, cultures, CAP/COVID (PCR <100).
CVC re-evaluation threshold: fever 38.3°C (IDSA definition). Dwell >7 days + fever → removal/exchange + paired blood cultures (bacterial x2).

Empiric echinocandin (Anidulafungina/Micafungina/Caspofungina) for candidemia. Dual workup paths (criterio_9: full bacterial+fungal; criterio_10: fungi-only) share same alerta label but differ in scope.
3 rules: 2 OK (VERIFIED), 1 AMBIGUOUS dead-code variant. Histogram: 1 VERIFIED (ADOPT), 2 NOT_APPLICABLE. All decision-tree type.
Dose tables (weight criterio_3, renal criterio_4) stored as S3 PNG, not inline. Exceptions: Polimixina B, Linezolida, Oxacilina, Tigeciclina, Clindamicina skip renal adjust.

constraints.text: MUST preserve PT-BR vocabularies: VERMELHO/AMARELO/NEUTRO; criterio_N; payload_trilha_antimicrobiano; PAC, COVID-19.
MUST retire RULE-ANTIMICROBIANO-002 (calcular_alerta dead code, unreachable). RULE-ANTIMICROBIANO-001 (calcular_alerta_v2) is sole active path.
MUST resolve visibility gap: 12 criteria defined (RULE-ANTIMICROBIANO-003) but only 3,4,5,6,8 surfaced in TrilhaAntimicrobianoModel.get_detalhe(). V2 must define authoritative rendering scope.

MUST migrate dose tables (criterio_3 weight, criterio_4 renal) from S3 PNG to versioned inline lookup (clinical/domains/pharmaco). Document exception drugs: Polimixina B, Linezolida, Oxacilina, Tigeciclina, Clindamicina (no renal adjust).
MUST preserve candidemia workup duality (criterio_9: full diagnostic; criterio_10: fungi-only) as distinct rules or branching. Same alerta label masks different workup scopes.

open_questions: S3 PNG dose tables: version-control strategy (git vs manual S3 update)?
criterio_1 >7d: hard threshold or decision-support? Reset on spectrum change?
Visibility: surface all 12 criteria or maintain 3,4,5,6,8 split?
RULE-ANTIMICROBIANO-002 criterios==3 gap: known defect or audit discovery?

systemic_issues.issue: Criteria visibility mismatch (12 defined, only 3,4,5,6,8 rendered)
Dose tables as S3 PNG (not version-controlled)
Echinocandin workup duality (criterio_9/10 same label, different scope)
